title: Kleenex Balsam Pocket Tissues, 8 Pocket Packs of Travel Tissues, Balmcare to Protect and Soothe Your Nose for Cold & Flu

features: Protective Balm - Kleenex Balsam pocket tissues leave behind a protective balm to give superior soothing for the toughest cold & flu. Also contains Aloe Vera, Vitamin E and Calendula.

Travel Tissues - Containing 8 pocket packs of 9 tissues in each pack, take one in your car, bag or pocket so you’ll always have comfort and protection close to hand, whether you're at home or on the move.
Dermatologically Tested – Our balm pocket tissues have been dermatologically tested, making them safe to use on even the most sensitive skin.
FSC Certified - Forest management certification, made with materials from well-managed forests.
Trusted Brand - Kleenex Balsam Tissues is made by Kimberly-Clark, who also manufacture Andrex and Huggies, so you can be sure your soft pocket tissues are of the highest quality with 4-ply tissue.
description: Product Description Snotty noses. Stuffy noses. Streamy noses. They’re a part of everyday life. Especially during cold and flu season. So, when you’re not feeling your best, be kind to yourself and treat your nose to a little extra care when you grab Kleenex Balsam pocket tissues – your nose's favourite sidekick. Don't let a runny nose ruin your day. Wipe, blow and soothe your nose with travel tissues you can trust. Kleenex Balsam tissues are soft and kind to snotty noses. With Aloe Vera and Vitamin E, the protective balm helps to soothe your nose, so banish the redness and hold your head high. Containing 8 pocket packs of 9 tissues in each pack, take one in your car, bag or pocket so you’ll always have comfort and protection close to hand, whether you're at home or on the move. Same Kleenex comfort, now with superior soothing power compared with Kleenex Original tissues. Kleenex Balsam tissues aren’t just about protecting your runny nose. We designed our tissue boxes so you can easily recycle them - and we're sticklers for using less plastic when we make our tissues. Wipe, recycle, repeat. Ingredients Paraffin Liquidum, Stearyl Alcohol, Paraffin, Cera Microcristallina, Isopropyl Palmitate, Dimethicone Tocopherol, Caprylic/capric, Triglyceride, Calendula Officinalis Extract, Aloe Barbadensis Extract
